description: Connector contract for customer-owned third-party knowledge bases and provider-sold online industry knowledge packs.

customer_owned_external_kb.storage_policy: May sync metadata, excerpts, embeddings, or selected files according to customer admin settings and third-party permissions.
customer_owned_external_kb.download_policy: Follow the customer's third-party permissions and connector terms.

provider_sold_industry_kb.storage_policy: Do not copy readable source documents into tenant company or project knowledge bases.
provider_sold_industry_kb.download_policy: No download, no export, no bulk copy, and no use outside Digital Office.

injection_decision_tree.condition: The source is customer-owned and should be reused across the whole organization.
The source is customer-owned and only relevant to one active matter, case, client, campaign, or product build.
The source is customer-owned but should only be used by a specialist Agent.
examples: publishing rules for media editor agent

injection_decision_tree.condition: The source is a provider-sold online industry knowledge pack.

licensed_reference_layer.description: A fourth retrieval layer mounted beside company/project/KeyMemory, used only for provider-sold online industry knowledge.
licensed_reference_layer.agent_context_policy: Agents receive only authorized snippets, source ids, citations, and retrieval metadata. They never receive a downloadable pack path.

mount_scopes.licensed_company_reference: All allowed users, projects, and agents in a tenant can query this pack inside Digital Office.
mount_scopes.licensed_project_reference: Only selected projects can query this pack.
mount_scopes.licensed_agent_reference: Only selected specialist agents can query this pack, optionally within selected projects.

connector_contract.permission_mapping: Connector permissions must map external users/groups to Digital Office tenant users, roles, projects, and agents before retrieval.

gui_flow: Admin chooses customer-owned connector or provider-sold industry knowledge product.
System explains ownership, allowed use, and download/export policy.
Admin selects mount scope: company, project, or specialist Agent.
System validates entitlement, external auth, role permission, project membership, and agent permission.
System creates a mount record without copying forbidden provider-owned source documents.
Every Agent query uses the mount record and writes an access log with tenant, deployment, user, project, Agent, workflow run, knowledge pack, and entitlement.
